title: Palicourea toensis
taxonomy: Palicourea toensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the Rubiaceae family, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the madder family. The genus Palicourea is a group of plants that are native to the Americas and the Caribbean. Palicourea toensis is classified as a shrub or small tree that is native to Costa Rica. It is a part of the Rubiales order, which is a group of flowering plants that are related to coffee and gardenias.
